text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer! Now that the<n>break's over,
let's get to training!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And wouldn't you know, I've<n>prepared the
perfect divination<n>technique for this very purpose!
Here<n>goes...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Look at the angle of my<n>arms! This is
what you've gotta do to<n>separate wooden
chopsticks<n>perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Training is gonna go pretty well today,<n>I'm sure of
it!
